description: Allowlist of approved external MCP servers with security constraints

context7.rationale: Read-only library documentation. No write access. No auth tokens.

web-fetch.rationale: Local web-fetch MCP — fetches arbitrary URLs for content extraction. Network access required by design. SSRF validation + prompt injection sanitizer mitigate risks.
mitigations: SSRF: hostname blocklist + dns.promises.lookup() IP check against private ranges
Injection: 8-stage sanitizer strips hidden content, zero-width chars, fake LLM delimiters, base64
Size: PostToolUse hook enforces 50KB response cap
Cache: content blobs have SHA-256 integrity checks
